details.test: Task 1: Reserve cheapest male show prospect puppy under 2500 in May 2025
Task 2: Book earliest Saturday afternoon standard kennel tour for group of 3
Task 3: Choose best-value stud dog under 1500 with hip score A and DNA clear
Task 4: Register for cheapest handling workshop within 100 miles in next 3 months
Task 5: Shop logo t-shirt under 30 and high-rated free-shipping item, then go to checkout
Task 6: Join waitlist for planned litter with fully health-tested parents and black and tan color
Task 7: Ask detailed puppy availability question via contact form
Task 8: Track two events in watchlist (adapted to available handling workshops)
